title: Deleted Photos
drDigitalIntro:
Deleting a photo doesn't erase it right away.
• It goes to a Recently Deleted folder for 30 days.
• You can recover it there if you change your mind.
• After 30 days it's deleted for good. Let's delete and recover one.

playgroundTask.goal: You deleted and recovered a photo

steps.say: Click the Cat Sleeping photo to open it.
Click Delete to move it to Recently Deleted.
Click 'Recently Deleted' in the sidebar to see deleted photos.
Click the Cat Sleeping photo to open it in Recently Deleted.
Click Recover to put it back in your library.

drDigitalSuccess: You deleted and recovered a photo! Recently Deleted gives you 30 days to change your mind.
drDigitalHint: Delete a photo first, then go to Recently Deleted in the sidebar to recover it.
